title: XLT-PhoenixCratesAddon
description: An addon to add a crate open objective for XLTournaments and PhoenixCrates
body:
This addon adds a new objective for the plugin XLTournaments & PhoenixCrates to allow a tournament where users must open crates to progress.


Requires:
- [XLTournaments](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/xltournaments-%E2%9C%85-ultimate-global-tournament-plugin-%E2%AD%90-25-objective-types-1-20.70630/)
- [PhoenixCrates](https://www.myphoenixstore.com/en/items/phoenix-crates)


Configuration:
- To use this objective create a new tournament and set the objective type to `PHOENIXCRATES_OPEN`
